projectDescription: An open-source, API-first e-commerce framework built on Symfony and Vue.js, offering a full-featured shop platform alongside a powerful extension system via plugins and apps.
keyFeatures: API-first architecture with three distinct APIs: Admin API, Store API, and Sync API
Custom Data Abstraction Layer (DAL) with Criteria-based querying — no Doctrine ORM
Powerful extension system: Apps (cloud-ready, lightweight) and Plugins (full Symfony bundles)
Flow Builder for event-driven business process automation without code
Twig-based Storefront with Bootstrap 5 and full theme system
Vue 3 + TypeScript Admin panel with component library
CMS system (Shopping Experiences) for building content pages
Elasticsearch/OpenSearch integration for scalable product search
Rule-based conditions engine for pricing, shipping, and promotions
Multi-channel (Sales Channel) support for different storefronts and languages
publicApiSurface: GET/POST /api/ — Admin REST API (CRUD for all entities)
EntityRepository — DAL repository for reading/writing entities
Criteria — Query builder for DAL searches
EntityDefinition — Schema definition for custom entities
Plugin base class (Shopware\Core\Framework\Plugin) — Plugin lifecycle hooks
AbstractRoute — Decoration pattern for Store API routes
